item.title: Vanda / Nereus (Motion Sickness Drug)
item.description:
• Summary: Vanda Pharmaceuticals has initiated a clinical study for its motion sickness drug Nereus in patients using GLP-1 receptor agonists, investigating potential efficacy or safety interactions in this population to address motion sickness exacerbated by such therapies.
  • MoAs: Nereus is an antihistamine or antimuscarinic agent that modulates vestibular system activity to prevent nausea and dizziness associated with motion sickness.
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma
